basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) has released the official Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical) Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 on a contract basis. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with an MD/ MS/ DNB in a relevant medical specialty, a Master's degree in Clinical Psychology, Social Work, or a relevant subject with 3 years of post-qualification experience, or a Ph.D. in a relevant field can apply via e

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) is 40 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree in relevant medical specialty (MD/MD/DNB) or Master's degree (in Clinical Psychology / Social Work or relevant subject) with 3 years post-qualification experience. Or PhD in a relevant field.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical): Post graduate degree in relevant medical specialty (MD/MD/DNB) or Master's degree (in Clinical Psychology / Social Work or relevant subject) with 3 years post-qualification experience. Or PhD in a relevant field.

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical): Rs. 67000/- + 20% HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Post graduate degree in relevant medical specialty (MD/MD/DNB) or Master's degree (in Clinical Psychology / Social Work or relevant subject) with 3 years post-qualification experience. Or PhD in a relevant field.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist IIVacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical): Post graduate degree in relevant medical specialty (MD/MD/DNB) or Master's degree (in Clinical Psychology / Social Work or relevant subject) with 3 years post-qualification experience. Or PhD in a relevant field.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) is 40 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist II (Non-medical): Rs. 67000/- + 20% HRA per month.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is 22 July 2026. Candidates must submit their applications via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post in the AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) posts at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is entirely online, via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) at AIIMS Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) position will receive a salary of Rs. 67000/- per month, along with an additional 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Post graduate degree in a relevant medical specialty or a Master's degree with 3 years of experience, or a PhD in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) posts involves a Walk-In Interview followed by document verification. Candidates must attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q9. When is the Walk-In Interview scheduled for Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical)?
faq.answer: The Walk-In Interview for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) position at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post is Bhubaneswar, Odisha, specifically at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar campus.
